steps.title: Apply the area conversion rule: square the linear scale factor
steps.content:
When converting between units, area scales by the square of the linear conversion factor. Since 1 mile = 1,760 yards, we have:
$$1 \text{ square mile} = (1,760)^2 \text{ square yards}$$
Calculate the conversion factor:
$$1,760^2 = 3,097,600 \text{ square yards per square mile}$$

steps.title: Multiply the township's area by the conversion factor
steps.content:
Convert 5.12 square miles to square yards:
$$5.12 \times 3,097,600 = 15,859,712 \text{ square yards}$$
This corresponds to choice D.
